code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)

mut uniq: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(n)
      if not list.contains(uniq, n)
        uniq = list.push(uniq, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut j = 0
while j < uniq.len()
  match uniq.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut k = 0
    while k < sorted.len()
      match sorted.get(k)
      when Some(y)
        if not inserted and x < y
          new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
          inserted = true
        end
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut m = 0
while m < sorted.len()
  match sorted.get(m)
  when Some(v)
    if m == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  m = m + 1
end
println(out)
